category_sources: official LIBLINEAR page describes a linear classifier for data with millions of instances and features
source_facts.description says library for large linear classification
display_name_sources: official project page title uses LIBLINEAR
docs_sources: official FAQ answers documentation, installation, and usage questions
official GitHub README provides usage and library integration documentation
official LIBLINEAR page contains documentation, download, paper references, and interface information
repo_sources: official LIBLINEAR page says the current release can be obtained from zip/tarball and also points to a GitHub directory; cjlin1/liblinear is the project repository with matching official README
tags_sources: official GitHub README describes classification, regression, outlier detection, train, and predict tools
official LIBLINEAR page lists linear SVM, logistic regression, support vector regression, and large-scale classification features
